applicable_situations: Worker in a scheduled employment paid below the state-notified minimum wage
Non-payment or under-payment of wages for the prescribed working hours
Failure to pay overtime wages at twice the ordinary rate
forum: Authority appointed under section 20 (typically the Labour Commissioner)
limitation_period_note: Application under section 20 must be filed within 6 months from the date the wages became payable; the Authority may admit a delayed application for sufficient cause.
procedural_steps: Compute the shortfall between wages paid and the state-notified minimum wage for the scheduled employment
File application before the Authority under section 20
Authority may direct payment of the shortfall plus compensation up to 10 times the shortfall
Appeal to the Labour Court / High Court if aggrieved by the order
required_documents: Proof of employment (appointment letter, attendance records)
Wage slips or evidence of wages paid
Notification of minimum wage for the scheduled employment
